pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page for pilots with quick access to weather, planning tools, training, and current briefing highlights.
primary_functions: Provide quick links to key tools: Weather & Briefing, Route Planner, Training, Events, Articles, Flight Schools, Medical Examiners, and Forum.
Show a summary of Todays Briefing items (e.g., recently added METAR/TAF, upcoming events).
Highlight recommended training courses, recent articles, and upcoming webinars relevant to the user.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the quick airport weather search form on the homepage.
Click the 'View full Todays Briefing' card or link in the briefing summary widget.
Submit the quick route planning widget with a departure airport.
Click on a recommended course card in the Training section.
Click a topic link or 'Explore Knowledge Base' shortcut.
Click the title of a recent article shown on the homepage.
Click an upcoming webinar or event card on the homepage.
Click a homepage tile such as 'Find Flight Schools & Aircraft'.
Click a homepage tile such as 'Find Medical Examiners'.
Click the 'Community Forum' shortcut or a featured forum topic.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Home' link in the main header navigation.
Users can directly navigate to index.html or the root URL.

pages.name: Weather & Briefing
pages.description: Unified weather search and briefing entry page where pilots can retrieve METAR/TAF and add items to Todays Briefing.
primary_functions: Allow users to search airport weather by code or name (e.g., enter KJFK in the 'Airport code' field) and display the selected airports weather.
Display structured weather blocks for the selected airport, including METAR and TAF sections with clearly labeled 'Add to Todays Briefing' buttons.
Show basic weather options such as raw/decoded views and indicate current unit settings (with deeper control in the briefing dashboard).
Provide a quick link to open the full 'Todays Briefing' dashboard to review and manage briefing items.

incoming_params.description: Airport search query or code (e.g., 'KJFK') used to pre-populate the airport weather search and immediately load METAR/TAF.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the 'Airport code' weather search form or select an airport from autocomplete suggestions.
Click the 'Todays Briefing' quick link/button to open the full briefing dashboard after adding METAR/TAF.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Weather & Briefing' link in the main header navigation.
Direct links can include ?airport=KJFK to load KJFK weather on page load.
Airport METAR/TAF is retrieved after submitting the airport search field.

pages.name: Today's Briefing Dashboard
pages.description: Dashboard to review, reorder, and configure Todays Briefing items and units.
primary_functions: List all items added to Todays Briefing (e.g., KJFK METAR, KJFK TAF, routes, notes) with clear labels and item types.
Support reordering briefing items via drag-and-drop or up/down controls (e.g., move KJFK METAR above KJFK TAF).
Offer briefing-wide settings, including a units/settings panel with options like 'Knots & statute miles' and an Apply/Save action.
Allow users to remove briefing items or mark them as reviewed/complete as needed.

incoming_params.description: Optional ID of a briefing item to highlight or scroll into view when the dashboard opens.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a METAR or TAF item in the briefing list to view full airport weather details.
Click an article-type briefing item to read the full article.
Click an event-type briefing item to open the event/webinar details.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Todays Briefing' link in the main header navigation.
Linked from the homepage briefing summary widget.
Optional ?focusItemId=BRIEFING_ITEM_ID can be used to focus a specific item.

pages.name: Route Planner
pages.description: Tool to plan VFR/IFR routes, search destinations, apply filters, and save routes into named lists.
primary_functions: Allow entry of a departure airport (e.g., KSFO) with autocomplete suggestions and selection.
Provide a destination search panel where users can set radius/distance limits (e.g., maximum 120 NM), runway length minimums (e.g., 4500 ft), and other suitability filters.
Display a list of candidate destination airports with sortable options (e.g., 'User rating  High to Low') and allow selecting one as the route destination.
Enable saving a route with a custom name (e.g., 'KSFO cross-country #1') and assigning it to a list/folder (e.g., 'Practice Flights', with ability to create that list).

incoming_params.description: ICAO or airport code to pre-fill the 'Departure' field (e.g., 'KSFO').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'View departure weather' action next to the departure field.
Click a 'View destination weather' action after selecting a destination airport.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Route Planner' link in the main header navigation.
Direct links can include ?departure=KSFO to pre-populate the departure airport.
Linked from homepage route widgets or contextual CTAs.

pages.name: Training Courses
pages.description: Course catalog and detail views for pilot training, including adding courses to a personalized training plan.
primary_functions: Provide a course search bar (e.g., search for 'IFR ground school') and display matching courses.
Offer filters for maximum price (e.g., $150), minimum rating (e.g., 4.5 stars or higher), and minimum duration (e.g., 8 hours or more).
Allow sorting by criteria such as 'Price  Low to High' to identify the most affordable qualifying course.
Show a course detail view (either as a dedicated panel or subview) with full description, price, rating, and duration, and includes an 'Add to Training Plan' button.
Support an 'Add to Training Plan' dialog where the user selects or enters a goal (e.g., 'IFR Rating') and chooses a target completion date, then confirms saving.

incoming_params.description: Optional initial search query to pre-populate the course search bar (e.g., 'IFR ground school').
ID of a course to open directly in the course detail view or panel.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the course search form to refresh the catalog with a new query.
Click a course card to open its detail view and update the URL.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Training Courses' link in the main header navigation.
Direct links can specify ?query=IFR+ground+school or ?courseId=COURSE_ID to control initial view.
The search form submits to the same page, updating results and URL parameters.

pages.name: Events & Webinars
pages.description: Events and webinars listing with topic/date filters and integrated registration workflow.
primary_functions: List upcoming events and webinars with topic/category filters (e.g., 'IFR Weather') and date range controls (e.g., October 2026).
Allow sorting webinars by date (e.g., 'Date  Soonest first') to find the earliest relevant session.
Provide a webinar detail view (on-page or as a subview) showing title, description, date/time, and a prominent 'Register' or 'Sign Up' button.
Include a registration form with name and email fields and notification options, letting users select 'Site notifications only' and a reminder time (e.g., '1 day before'), then submit registration.

incoming_params.description: Optional topic filter slug (e.g., 'ifr_weather') to pre-select a topic such as IFR Weather.
Optional ISO date string for the start of the default date range filter (e.g., '2026-10-01').
Optional ISO date string for the end of the default date range filter (e.g., '2026-10-31').
ID of an event/webinar to open directly in the detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Apply filters in the events list (topic and date range) to update results and URL.
Click an event/webinar row or card to open its detailed view.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Events & Webinars' link in the main header navigation.
Direct links can include filters (?topic=ifr_weather&startDate=2026-10-01&endDate=2026-10-31) or ?eventId=EVENT_ID.
Filter forms and sort controls submit to the same page to refresh event results.

pages.name: Articles & Knowledge Base
pages.description: Searchable article library for topics like airspace, procedures, and regulations.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar to look up topics (e.g., 'Class B airspace').
Offer filters such as 'Published after' date (e.g., 2022-01-01) and estimated reading time (e.g., '15 minutes or less').
Allow sorting results by popularity or rating (e.g., 'Most popular' or 'Top rated').
List article summaries that link to full article detail pages, with controls to return to the filtered results after reading.

incoming_params.description: Optional search term to pre-populate the article search bar (e.g., 'Class B airspace').
Optional ISO date string to pre-set the 'Published after' filter (e.g., '2022-01-01').
Optional maximum reading time in minutes to pre-set the reading time filter (e.g., 15).
Sort key such as 'most_popular' or 'top_rated' to define initial ordering of results.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit the article search and filter form to refresh the list and persist criteria in the URL.
Click an article title or 'Read more' link in the search results.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Knowledge Base' link in the main header navigation.
Direct links can include saved search criteria, e.g., ?query=Class+B+airspace&publishedAfter=2022-01-01&readingTimeMax=15.
Search and filter form submits to the same page to update article results.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full article view with controls to save articles into reading lists.
primary_functions: Display the full content of a selected article, including title, publication date, estimated reading time, and body text.
Provide a 'Save to reading list' or 'Add to list' button to store the article in a user-defined reading list.
Support creating or selecting reading lists (e.g., create/select 'Checkride Prep') in a save dialog and confirming the save.
Offer navigation back to the article results list (e.g., 'Back to results') while preserving the users previous filters and sort choices.

incoming_params.description: ID of the article whose full content should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to results' or a topic tag to return to an article list related to this article.

access_methods.description: Accessed via ?articleId=ARTICLE_ID when users click from the search results or other content.
Linked from article summaries on the homepage, knowledge base, or briefing dashboard.

pages.name: Directories (Schools & Examiners)
pages.description: Shared directory listing page used for both flight schools and medical examiners, controlled by a type parameter.
primary_functions: When opened as 'Flight Schools & Aircraft' (e.g., directoryType=flight_schools), allow searching by location (e.g., 'Denver, CO'), filtering by minimum school rating (e.g., 4 stars), and listing flight schools.
Provide clickable entries for flight schools that lead to the Flight School Detail page for more information and fleet exploration.

When opened as 'Medical Examiners' (e.g., directoryType=medical_examiners), allow searching by ZIP (e.g., 30303), setting radius (e.g., 30 miles), filtering by services (e.g., 'Class 1 medicals'), and availability (e.g., weekdays before 6:00 PM).
Support sorting examiner results by 'Next available appointment  Soonest first' and linking each examiner to its detail page.

incoming_params.description: Controls which directory mode is active: 'flight_schools' or 'medical_examiners'.
Optional initial location query for flight school searches (e.g., 'Denver, CO').
Optional initial ZIP code for medical examiner searches (e.g., '30303').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a flight school entry in the 'Flight Schools & Aircraft' directory view.
Click a medical examiner entry in the 'Medical Examiners' directory view.
Toggle between flight schools and medical examiners within the directory page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Flight Schools & Aircraft' and 'Medical Examiners' links, which pass directoryType in the URL.
Direct links specify ?directoryType=flight_schools or ?directoryType=medical_examiners (and may add location/zip).
Search and filter controls submit to the same directory page to refresh results.

pages.name: Flight School Detail & Fleet
pages.description: Detail page for a specific flight school, including its IFR-capable fleet and aircraft comparison tools.
primary_functions: Display key information about the selected flight school (rating, location, contact details, overview).
Provide a 'Fleet' or 'Aircraft' tab with filters for equipment (e.g., 'IFR capable') and maximum hourly wet rate (e.g., $180).
List aircraft (e.g., 'Cessna 172', 'Piper Archer') as cards that can be expanded or viewed in detail on-page, with an 'Add to comparison' action for each.
Offer a comparison panel or section that shows selected aircraft side-by-side, including hourly wet rental rate, to identify which is cheaper (or choose the first listed if equal).
Include a 'Mark as Preferred' control to save the chosen aircraft as the preferred trainer.

incoming_params.description: ID of the flight school to display, including its fleet.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to flight schools list' link from the school detail view.

access_methods.description: Accessed via ?flightSchoolId=FLIGHT_SCHOOL_ID from the directory listings.
Linked from the 'Flight Schools & Aircraft' directory results.

pages.name: Medical Examiner Detail
pages.description: Detail view for an Aviation Medical Examiner (AME) with contact and scheduling information.
primary_functions: Show examiner details such as name, address, distance from searched ZIP, certifications (e.g., Class 1 medicals), and typical availability.
Highlight next available appointment and weekday/ time-range information when applicable.
Provide a 'Save to Contacts' or 'Add to Contacts' button to store the examiner in the users contact list.
Support a contacts dialog where the user selects or creates a contact group (e.g., 'Medical Contacts'), optionally adds a note (e.g., 'Earliest weekday before 6 pm'), and confirms saving.

incoming_params.description: ID of the medical examiner whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to examiner list' from the examiner detail page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via ?medicalExaminerId=EXAMINER_ID from the medical examiner directory.
Linked from the 'Medical Examiners' directory results.

pages.name: Pilot Forum
pages.description: Community forum for pilots with categories such as Landings, where users can post questions and view threads.
primary_functions: Display forum categories (e.g., Landings) and lists of threads within each category.

Provide a 'New Post' or 'Ask a Question' workflow where the user selects a category (e.g., 'Landings'), enters a title (e.g., 'Short-field landing tips for Cessna 172'), and writes a multi-sentence description.
Support a tags input for adding exactly three tags (e.g., 'short-field', 'landing', 'c172'), confirming each tag.
Offer notification settings for the post, including deselecting email notifications and selecting 'Site notifications only' for replies.
Show an individual thread view (within the same page context) after posting, with the question and any replies.

incoming_params.description: ID of the forum category to show (e.g., the Landings category).
ID of a specific thread to open in detail view.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a forum category tile (e.g., 'Landings') to load its thread list.
Click on a thread title to open its thread detail view.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Community Forum' link in the main header navigation.
Direct links can specify ?categoryId=CATEGORY_ID or ?threadId=THREAD_ID to deep-link into the forum.
The 'New Post' form submits to create a thread and then shows the new thread.

pages.name: About
pages.description: Informational page describing the purpose of the pilot information website and its tools.
primary_functions: Explain the sites mission, focus on pilot support, and overview of available tools (weather, planning, training, resources).
Introduce the team or organization behind the site and any aviation credentials or partnerships.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a 'Contact us' link within the About page content.
Click a 'Learn how to use these tools' link or button.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'About' link in the footer navigation.
Users can directly navigate to about.html via a bookmarked or shared link.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page for user support, feedback, and inquiries.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form where users can submit questions, feedback, or issue reports.
List alternative contact details such as support email and, if applicable, a phone number or mailing address.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Contact' link in the footer navigation.
Users can navigate directly to contact.html to reach support.
The contact form submits a support request using the submitContactForm interface.

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Help center and frequently asked questions about using the sites features.
primary_functions: Offer step-by-step instructions for common tasks (e.g., adding METAR/TAF to Todays Briefing, saving routes, registering for webinars).
Provide troubleshooting tips and explanations of key aviation data fields and filters used throughout the site.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a contextual link like 'Open Weather & Briefing tool' in a task guide.
Click a link in the cross-country planning guide to open the Route Planner.
Click 'Find IFR ground school courses' in a training-related help article.
Click 'View Class B airspace articles' in a help topic.
Click 'See IFR Weather webinars' from an events-related help article.
Click a link like 'Ask in the Landings forum' for further questions.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Help & FAQ' link in the footer navigation.
Users can directly navigate to help_faq.html.

pages.name: Terms of Use
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the website and its content.
primary_functions: Present the terms and conditions under which users may access and use the site.
Outline limitations of liability, acceptable use, and other legal provisions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reference link to the Privacy Policy from within the Terms of Use text.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Terms of Use' link in the footer navigation.
Users can navigate directly to terms.html.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on how user data and privacy are handled.
primary_functions: Explain what data is collected, how it is used, and how it is stored.
Describe user choices regarding notifications (e.g., site notifications vs. email) and data preferences.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a reference link to the Terms of Use from within the Privacy Policy text.

access_methods.description: Accessed via the 'Privacy Policy' link in the footer navigation.
Users can navigate directly to privacy.html.

header_links.description: Homepage with quick access to all major tools
Airport weather search and add items to Todays Briefing
Briefing dashboard to review and configure briefing items and units
Find pilot training courses and add them to your training plan
Browse and register for aviation events and webinars
Search and filter articles and how-to content
Find and view flight schools and their aircraft fleets
Search for Aviation Medical Examiners by ZIP and availability
Pilot forum for questions and discussions

footer_links.description: Help center and frequently asked questions
Legal terms for using the site
Information on privacy and data handling
